name: Malenia || Elden Ring
description:
Malenia was born as a powerful demigod, the twin sister to Miquella. She was gifted with extraordinary strength and combat prowess. However, her body was cursed with the Scarlet Rot, a corruption that plagued her existence. Despite this affliction, she remained loyal and protective of her brother Miquella, becoming his guardian and defender. Throughout her journey, Malenia faced numerous battles and adversaries, ultimately becoming known as the Blade of Miquella and the Goddess of Rot. Her fierce dedication to her brother and her unyielding will make her one of the most formidable opponents for the Tarnished.
